summary: Comprehensive testing of MPS Bee Shop Kiosk iteration 3 - all 22 backend API tests passed, all new features working correctly. Student photos support (objects with name field), token balance tracking, session date filtering, and bigger kiosk buttons all verified.

backend_api: GET /api/auth/google/login returns valid Google OAuth URL
GET /api/items returns list of shop items
DELETE /api/items/{name} deletes item and verifies removal
GET /api/sessions returns list of sessions with date field
POST /api/sessions creates and activates new session
GET /api/students returns students as objects with 'name' field (NEW)
GET /api/report/balances returns cumulative balance data per student (NEW)
Sessions have date field for filtering (NEW)
frontend_ui: Login page renders with Google Sign-In button
Step 1: Class selection with big buttons (py-4 text-3xl)
Step 2: Student selection shows initials avatar circle and student name (min-h-[72px])
Step 3: Numpad fits iPad without scroll
Step 4: Item buttons bigger (min-h-[68px]), Save Transaction visible without scroll
Admin Overview: Token Balances table appears with cumulative data (NEW)
Admin Sessions: Date filter input exists (type='date') (NEW)
Admin Students: Student names display correctly with new object format (NEW)
Admin Items: Add item form, item list with edit/delete

seed_data_creation: Created test session in MongoDB for authenticated UI testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: (1) Students API returns objects {name, photo_url?} instead of strings - frontend handles both formats, (2) /api/report/balances endpoint returns cumulative savings per student, (3) Sessions have date field and admin has date filter input, (4) Kiosk buttons are bigger: class py-4 text-3xl, student min-h-[72px], item min-h-[68px]. Google OAuth cannot be fully tested end-to-end (requires real Google interaction).
test_credentials: Simulated auth via MongoDB session insertion: db.admin_sessions.insertOne({session_token:'test_playwright_session', email:'test@test.com', name:'Test Teacher', picture:'', role:'admin', expires_at:'2027-01-01T00:00:00+00:00', created_at:'2026-03-30T00:00:00+00:00'})
